name: G. E. Smith
abstract: George Edward Smith (né Haddad; born January 27, 1952) is an American guitarist. Smith was the lead guitarist for the duo Hall & Oates during the band's heyday from 1979 to 1985, playing on several albums and five number one singles.

about_quotes.speaker: Chris Parker
about_quotes.evidence: But at the time I was with him it was always guitar or acoustic guitar... G.E. Smith, Tony Garnier, or before Tony, Kenny Aaronsson on bass you know, adjusted quickly.
about_quotes.doc_title: Chris Parker interviewed by Monk Rowe, via Zoom, January 5, 2023
